title: basilaea bifolia
intro: Basilaea bifolia, also known as twin-leaf or two-leaved basil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Basilaea bifolia include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Basilaea bifolia is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction for its herbal preparations, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
